title: polygala rupestris var. canescens
intro: Polygala rupestris var. canescens, also known as a variety of the Rock or Mountain Polygala, is a type of flowering plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and inflammation. The root and leaves of Polygala rupestris var. canescens contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, coughs, and asthma. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusions for its herbal benefits, which include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function.
